product_overview: A creator-facing web platform for publishing and managing illustrated folk stories with a public landing/reader and a protected Creator Studio dashboard for story and asset management. Users can register and log in to access the Creator Studio where they build, preview and publish stories.
core_goals: Allow readers to discover content on the public landing and reader.
Let users register and sign in with email/password to personalize their experience.
Provide creators a protected Creator Studio dashboard to create, edit, and manage stories and related assets.
Make it possible for creators to view overview statistics and move from editing to the story editor to publish content.

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account using an email and password so the user can access creator-only features.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Provide email -> Provide password -> Submit registration form -> See confirmation of account creation
Navigate to /register -> Provide invalid email -> Provide password -> Submit registration form -> See inline validation error about email format

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate existing users with email and password to unlock their Creator Studio.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /dashboard/overview -> See dashboard overview
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email with incorrect format -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See validation error about email
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email of non-existent account -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See message that credentials are invalid

features.name: Creator Studio Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated creators open the dashboard to view project-level overview statistics and jump into story editing workflows.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /dashboard/overview -> View overview statistics -> Navigate to story editor
Navigate to /dashboard/overview -> See overview statistics -> Open story editor from dashboard -> Edit story metadata -> Save changes -> Return to overview and see updated metadata reflected

features.name: Public Landing and Reader
features.description: Allow anonymous visitors to browse the public landing page and access published stories without signing in.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See public landing with featured stories -> Select a story to read -> Read published story in reader
Navigate to / -> Use site search (if present) -> Open a published story -> Read story content

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials via Supabase
